title: Manage erosion and sediment control
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage erosion and sediment control demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Conduct an audit and identify areas with erosion and sediment problems

pcs.text: Identify soils susceptible to erosion and sediment loss and relationship to land classes for erosion potential
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify soils susceptible to erosion and sediment loss and relationship to land classes for erosion potential?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify soils susceptible to erosion and sediment loss and relationship to land classes for erosion potential.

pcs.text: Conduct a property or site audit and document details using appropriate methodology
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a property or site audit and document details using appropriate methodology?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a property or site audit and document details using appropriate methodology.

pcs.text: Identify and classify types of erosion and sediment loss
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and classify types of erosion and sediment loss?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and classify types of erosion and sediment loss.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and manmade factors that influence rates and effects of erosion and sediment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and manmade factors that influence rates and effects of erosion and sediment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and manmade factors that influence rates and effects of erosion and sediment.

pcs.text: Estimate the economic and environmental losses caused by erosion and sediment losses
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate the economic and environmental losses caused by erosion and sediment losses?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate the economic and environmental losses caused by erosion and sediment losses.

pcs.text: Identify appropriate external sources of support to assist in the planning processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify appropriate external sources of support to assist in the planning processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate external sources of support to assist in the planning processes.

pcs.text: Identify regulatory planning authorities and environmental legislation relevant to current and future project planning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify regulatory planning authorities and environmental legislation relevant to current and future project planning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify regulatory planning authorities and environmental legislation relevant to current and future project planning.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Conduct an audit and identify areas with erosion and sediment problems

elements.title: Develop erosion and sediment control plan

pcs.text: Investigate erosion and sediment control measures consistent with industry guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate erosion and sediment control measures consistent with industry guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate erosion and sediment control measures consistent with industry guidelines.

pcs.text: Develop and record erosion and sediment control strategies for project area in cooperation with landowner, relevant government and planning authorities, and stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and record erosion and sediment control strategies for project area in cooperation with landowner, relevant government and planning authorities, and stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and record erosion and sediment control strategies for project area in cooperation with landowner, relevant government and planning authorities, and stakeholders.

pcs.text: Identify contingency procedures for potential problems that may require future rectifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify contingency procedures for potential problems that may require future rectifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify contingency procedures for potential problems that may require future rectifications.

pcs.text: Develop erosion and sediment control plan to meet design principles including environmental concerns, physical impacts, land use, production systems and personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop erosion and sediment control plan to meet design principles including environmental concerns, physical impacts, land use, production systems and personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop erosion and sediment control plan to meet design principles including environmental concerns, physical impacts, land use, production systems and personnel.

pcs.text: Develop monitoring processes for evaluating and reporting performance against erosion and sediment control plan for achieving short-term and long-term outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop monitoring processes for evaluating and reporting performance against erosion and sediment control plan for achieving short-term and long-term outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop monitoring processes for evaluating and reporting performance against erosion and sediment control plan for achieving short-term and long-term outcomes.

pcs.text: Determine and communicate roles and responsibilities of personnel and stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and communicate roles and responsibilities of personnel and stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and communicate roles and responsibilities of personnel and stakeholders.

pcs.text: Document erosion and sediment control plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document erosion and sediment control plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document erosion and sediment control plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop erosion and sediment control plan

elements.title: Implement and manage the erosion and sediment control plan

pcs.text: Implement tasks according to erosion and sediment control plan and design principles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement tasks according to erosion and sediment control plan and design principles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement tasks according to erosion and sediment control plan and design principles.

pcs.text: Assess the workplace health and safety risks and environmental impacts associated with control plan activities, and implement suitable controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the workplace health and safety risks and environmental impacts associated with control plan activities, and implement suitable controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the workplace health and safety risks and environmental impacts associated with control plan activities, and implement suitable controls.

pcs.text: Manage the communication process, including strategies for conflict resolution and problem solving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage the communication process, including strategies for conflict resolution and problem solving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage the communication process, including strategies for conflict resolution and problem solving.

pcs.text: Monitor progress to ensure time, performance, cost and quality of work are achieved

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor progress to ensure time, performance, cost and quality of work are achieved.

pcs.text: Investigate and negotiate proposed variations to plan with key stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and negotiate proposed variations to plan with key stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and negotiate proposed variations to plan with key stakeholders.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct inspection to review work completion and collate monitoring data.

pcs.text: Identify alterations or modifications to the plan, and report to key stakeholders, developer or consent authority
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify alterations or modifications to the plan, and report to key stakeholders, developer or consent authority?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify alterations or modifications to the plan, and report to key stakeholders, developer or consent authority.

pcs.text: Review outcomes of completed erosion and sediment control plan against agreed short-term and long-term objectives and report to key stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review outcomes of completed erosion and sediment control plan against agreed short-term and long-term objectives and report to key stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review outcomes of completed erosion and sediment control plan against agreed short-term and long-term objectives and report to key stakeholders.

indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
